metadata.title: Spark901 | Code for Good. Powered in Memphis.
metadata.description: Open-source software infrastructure that helps nonprofits and community organizations scale their impact—faster, cheaper, and sustainably.

hero.tagline: Code for Good. Powered in Memphis.
hero.headline: Fund the tools that power nonprofits
hero.description: Your contribution builds permanent, open-source infrastructure that helps hundreds of organizations do more good—forever.
hero.socialProof: {count}+ people have already joined the movement

impact.title: One tool. Hundreds of nonprofits. Unlimited impact.
impact.description: Traditional donations help one org once. Tech funding creates infrastructure that scales across hundreds of organizations—forever. That's compounding impact.

step1.title: Pick Your Project
step1.description: Browse our catalog of plain-English project descriptions. No tech jargon, just clear impact.

step2.title: Fund the Build
step2.description: Contribute any amount—one-time or monthly. 100% goes to development. No overhead fees.

step3.title: Watch It Multiply
step3.description: Your investment powers tools that serve hundreds of organizations. Track your impact in real-time.

cta.title: You don't need to code to build technology that changes lives.
cta.subtitle: Join {count}+ supporters funding the future of nonprofit tech.

fundATool.title: Fund a Tool
fundATool.description: Choose a project that resonates with you. Every dollar builds permanent infrastructure for social good.

whyFund.title: Why Fund Open-Source Tech?
whyFund.subtitle: The smartest investment you can make in social good.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.description: Nonprofits waste 40% of their budget on outdated, overpriced software. They deserve better.

solution.title: The Spark901 Solution
solution.description: We build free, open-source tools designed specifically for social impact organizations. Fund once, help forever.

compounding.title: The Compounding Effect
compounding.description: Unlike traditional donations that get spent once, tech funding creates permanent infrastructure. Every dollar keeps working—forever.

comparison.traditionalDesc: $1,000 helps one org for one program

memphisNonprofitHub.title: Memphis is a nonprofit hub
memphisNonprofitHub.description: The Mid-South packs extraordinary mission-driven density. Spark901 is part of the Digital Delta—local builders who believe great software should strengthen nonprofits, not leave them behind.
memphisNonprofitHub.densityBody: Memphis leads major U.S. metros in nonprofits relative to population—an ecosystem that needs tools built for real missions.
memphisNonprofitHub.orgsBody: More than 6,500 in the Memphis area anchor food security, health, youth programs, arts, and more.
memphisNonprofitHub.jobsBody: Together they steward over {billions} billion in assets—work that deserves reliable, modern infrastructure.

about.title: About Spark901
about.mission: We're a for-good, Memphis-rooted studio: contributions fund quality, open-source software for organizations that need it—especially nonprofits—so donations keep turning into durable public tools, not gated SaaS.

values.title: What We Stand For
values.openSourceDesc: Every line of code is public. When you fund our work, the whole sector benefits.
values.communityDesc: We're professional engineers funded by people who believe in better nonprofit tech.
values.memphisDesc: Memphis is a nonprofit hub—we're in the Digital Delta, building tech that helps that ecosystem punch above its weight.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.subtitle: See exactly where every dollar goes.
transparency.fundsDescription: 100% of contributions fund tools. Here's the breakdown:
transparency.openSourceNote: All code is public on GitHub. Audit us anytime.
transparency.legalNote: Spark901 is an LLC, not a 501(c)(3). Contributions are not tax-deductible but do fund permanent public infrastructure.

footer.tagline: Code for Good. Powered in Memphis.
footer.description: Building permanent technology infrastructure for organizations doing good.
footer.copyright: © {year} Spark901. Built with love in Memphis.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Introduction

Spark901 is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and share information about you when you use our website and services.

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you fund a tool, sign up for our newsletter, or contact us. This may include your name, email address, and payment information processed through our third-party provider, Stripe.

How We Use Information

We use the information we collect to provide and improve our services, process transactions, communicate with you, and ensure the security of our platform.

Sharing of Information

We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, such as payment processing and data hosting.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. Please contact us at hello@spark901.org to exercise these rights.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Spark901, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

Use of Services

You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of any account information.

Contributions

Contributions made to fund tools on Spark901 are non-refundable. 100% of your contribution goes toward the development and maintenance of open-source technology.

Intellectual Property

The Spark901 platform and its original content are owned by Spark901. Tools funded through our platform are released under open-source licenses.

Limitation of Liability

Spark901 shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of your use of our services.

californiaPrivacy.title: California Privacy Policy
californiaPrivacy.content:
California Privacy Disclosures

Under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and the California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA), California residents have specific rights regarding their personal information.

Right to Know and Access

You have the right to request that we disclose what personal information we collect, use, and share about you.

Right to Delete

You have the right to request the deletion of your personal information collected by Spark901.

Right to Opt-Out

Spark901 does not sell your personal information. We do not share your personal information for cross-context behavioral advertising.

No Discrimination

We will not discriminate against you for exercising any of your CCPA rights.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.content:
Introduction

This Cookie Policy explains how Spark901 uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website.

What are Cookies?

Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used by website owners to make their websites work, or to work more efficiently.

How We Use Cookies

We use cookies for technical reasons in order for our website to operate. These are referred to as 'essential' or 'strictly necessary' cookies. Other cookies also enable us to track and target the interests of our users to enhance the experience on our website.

Your Choices

You can set or amend your web browser controls to accept or refuse cookies. If you choose to reject cookies, you may still use our website though your access to some functionality and areas of our website may be restricted.

digitalAcceptance.title: Digital Acceptance
digitalAcceptance.content:
Electronic Communications

By using Spark901, you consent to receive electronic communications from us. These communications include notices about your account, payment confirmations, and other information concerning our services.

Consent to Electronic Signature

By clicking 'I Agree' or 'Fund a Tool', you agree that your electronic signature is as legally binding as a physical signature on a paper document. This consent applies to all transactions and disclosures related to our services.

Withdrawing Consent

You may withdraw your consent to receive electronic communications at any time by contacting us at hello@spark901.org. If you withdraw your consent, we may terminate your access to our services.

fairUse.title: Fair Use Policy
fairUse.content:
Acceptable Use

Spark901 provides platform tools to the community. You agree to use these tools only for their intended purposes and in a manner that does not infringe on the rights of others.

Prohibited Activities

You may not use Spark901 to engage in any activity that is illegal, harmful, or disruptive. This includes, but is not limited to, the transmission of malware, the unauthorized collection of personal data, or any attempt to interfere with the operation of our platform.

Open Source License

Tools and code developed through Spark901 are released under open-source licenses. Your use of such tools and code must comply with the terms of the applicable license.

Reporting Abuse

If you encounter any use of our platform that violates this Fair Use Policy, please report it to hello@spark901.org.

dpa.title: Data Processing Agreement
dpa.content:
Purpose

This Data Processing Agreement (DPA) sets out the terms for the processing of personal data by Spark901 on behalf of our users and partner organizations.

Processing Obligations

Spark901 will process personal data only in accordance with the documented instructions of the data controller and for the purposes of providing our services.

Confidentiality

We ensure that persons authorized to process the personal data have committed themselves to confidentiality or are under an appropriate statutory obligation of confidentiality.

Security

Spark901 implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk of data processing.

Sub-processors

We use certain sub-processors to assist in our processing activities, such as data hosting and payment processing. We maintain a list of all sub-processors and will provide notice of any changes.

aiDisclosure.title: AI Disclosure
aiDisclosure.content:
Use of Artificial Intelligence

Spark901 may use artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning technologies to improve our platform and assist in the development of open-source tools.

Development Assistance

We use AI tools to help our engineers write, review, and test code. This allows us to build and deploy high-quality tools faster and more efficiently for the nonprofit community.

Transparency

We are committed to transparency in our use of AI. If AI is used to generate content or make decisions that significantly impact our users, we will provide notice and context regarding that use.

Human Oversight

All code and features developed with the assistance of AI are subject to human review and testing by our professional engineering team to ensure security, reliability, and accuracy.

thankYou.title: You're Incredible!
thankYou.subtitle: Your contribution to {project} is building technology that empowers communities.
